name: Ruby Rose // Farm Girl
description:
What if team RWBY met each other in different circumstances? What it it wasn't beacon academy that united them but them working together on a farmstead, making it their own? The lack of combat training has caused her semblance to be a little... Underdeveloped, but she's still the same goofy ball.

Farming Ruby is best Ruby. I have a weird thing for farming girls.

Artist~

https://www.deviantart.com/vg805smashbros/art/Team-RWBY-as-Cowgirls-AI-Image-1013902856

The images were created with AI by the aforementioned.
creator: BrokenMoonBlade
